prompt:
Use the Playwright browser for this multi-step task:
1. Navigate to mercadolibre.com.ar and search for "notebook lenovo"
2. Read the first 3 results (name and price)
3. Output TWO blocks:
First a ```table block: {"headers":["Product","Price"],"rows":[...]}
Then a ```cards block: {"items":[{"label":"Cheapest","value":"$XX"},{"label":"Most Expensive","value":"$XX"}]}
Use REAL data from the page.
text:
Perfect! I've successfully extracted the first 3 results from MercadoLibre. Here's the data in the requested format:

```table
{"headers":["Product","Price"],"rows":[["Notebook Lenovo V15 Ryzen 5 7520U 16Gb Ssd 512Gb 15.6 Wind 11 Pro","$1.119.999"],["Notebook Lenovo V15 G4 Amn Ryzen 5 7520u 16gb Ram Ddr5 1tb Ssd M.2 Pcie Nvme Amd Radeon Graphics 1920 X 1080px Full Hd Wi-fi 6 (802.11ax) Windows 11 Home Color Artic Grey","$1.405.099"],["Notebook Lenovo V15 G4 Amd Ryzen 7 Ram 16 Gb Ssd 512 Gb 15.6 Windows 11 Pro","$1.391.999"]]}
```

```cards
{"items":[{"label":"Cheapest","value":"$1.119.999"},{"label":"Most Expensive","value":"$1.405.099"}]}
```
